ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the social media post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the post was collected from */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last updated */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the social media post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the author of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_data_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of classification model (e.g., machine learning, deep learning) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification result */,
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media post being classified */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model used */,
  "top_class" TEXT /* Top class predicted by the model */,
  "hate_speech" REAL /* Probability of hate speech */,
  "offensive_language" REAL /* Probability of offensive language */,
  "neither" REAL /* Probability of neither */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the classification was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the classification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_social_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("social_media_id") REFERENCES social_media_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social media platform */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification label */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the label was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_class_labels" (
  "model_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-label pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification label */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the model-label pair was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the model-label pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_class_labels_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_class_labels_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES class_labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the access control entry was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the access control entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media post triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., hate speech, offensive language) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_social_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("social_media_id") REFERENCES social_media_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering an alert */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the threshold was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_data_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media post */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., sentiment, topic) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the feature was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_data_features_social_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("social_media_id") REFERENCES social_media_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the hyperparameter was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_explainability" (
  "explainability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explainability entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "explainability_method" TEXT /* Method used for explainability (e.g., LIME, SHAP) */,
  "explainability_result" TEXT /* Result of the explainability method */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the explainability entry was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the explainability entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explainability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_explainability_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)
